description:
The shim from 6.2 needs to bring the full Runtime online including scheduler and CURRENT_RUNTIME TLS. Once linked, fz spawn/send/receive should work in AOT identically to JIT.

## Acceptance

- `# paths: jit, interp, aot` on concurrency_ping_pong.fz; matrix green.
- Closes fz-ul4.22.
title: AOT concurrency: spawn/send/receive in linked binaries
